anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Stage-mixed traditions and practitioners, where active effort, surrender, grace, teacher recognition, ordinary conduct, and no-attainment are all present at different moments.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Keeps the idea at extended. It can only rise if voice coding predicts warnings, confusion, and repair better than self-power, Other Power, Pargament agency style, teacher style, and clinical-risk baselines.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If most actual paths shift voices by stage, role, and context, then active versus middle voice will not sort traditions or predict guidance. Pure Land practitioners still say the nembutsu, Zen practitioners still sit, Christian grace traditions still discipline attention, and high-striving nondual practitioners may still benefit from release advice despite no-owner doctrine.

claim_units: The validate-versus-undermine and retain-abandon-embody grid is mostly prior art, not discovery.
Dogen, Shinran, and the Heart Sutra break the grid by rejecting an active owner who finishes and assigns custody.
The better variable may be grammatical voice of completion-talk: active, middle, passive, or mixed.
Release teaching fits people who believed they held or earned the result.
The modern human problem is achievement-contingent self-worth and burnout, not spiritual completion in general.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Coaches who screen for perceived result ownership before giving detachment advice will reduce perfectionistic rumination and burnout better than coaches who give universal 'let go of the outcome' advice.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Advice to let go of outcomes helps people who over-own results as proof of worth. It can misfire for people whose outcomes are mainly constrained by systems, teams, luck, injury, caregiving load, discrimination, or externally assigned roles.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Screened and universal advice have equal effects, or material constraints, workload, sleep, discrimination, team support, and clinical variables fully explain outcomes with no added effect from ownership-language fit.

exact_claim: Advice to use a method, release it, and not own the result is not a universal account of practice completion. It is medicine for active-voice, self-power practitioners who believe effort earns results and convert those results into worth. Other-power, practice-realization, and no-attainment sources strain the release frame because they deny the practitioner as holder, the method as completed possession, or the linear after in which release would occur.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: High-striving practitioners who describe results as earned will show reduced pride, shame, comparison, and burnout after the Earning Check, while other-power or practice-realization practitioners will show little benefit or increased self-monitoring from the same instruction.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Release teaching is cohort-specific medicine for active earning and result-ownership.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized pilot stratified by self-power language, perfectionism, tradition background, and achievement-contingent self-worth.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: All cohorts benefit equally, or the instruction mainly licenses avoidance, passivity, or contempt for ordinary responsibility.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coding of completion-talk as active, middle, passive, mixed, or no-voice predicts held-out warnings, repairs, and supervision needs better than retain, release, embody categories alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Grammatical voice predicts practice guidance better than custody-grid coding.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source codebook tested on MN 22, Tannisho, Dogen, Heart Sutra, Rinzai koan curriculum, Christian grace texts, and practitioner interviews.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Custody values, tradition identity, teacher style, institution type, or Pargament agency styles predict guidance as well as or better than voice coding.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Coders will overuse embodied-without-ownership for Dogen, Shinran, Heart Sutra, Dzogchen, apophasis, and other hard cases, with low inter-rater reliability and weak prediction of warnings.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The embodied-without-ownership cell is too elastic.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Inter-rater trial comparing the old two-axis grid against active, middle, passive, and mixed voice labels.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The cell has clear boundaries, high inter-rater reliability, and predicts concrete repairs better than voice coding.

literature_search_queries: middle voice Eckhart modern continental philosophy relinquishment human will agency activity passivity
Shinran jinen honi no calculation Other Power no working is true working
Tannisho nembutsu not practice not good act self-power Other Power
Dogen practice and realization are one no means and end zazen
Pargament religious problem-solving self-directing collaborative deferring styles
Snakes and Ladders Nagarjuna Wittgenstein therapeutic method no theses
Heart Sutra no attainment rely on Prajnaparamita

near_neighbors.difference: Lewin centers Eckhart and Heidegger, not Dogen, Shinran, Heart Sutra, or a modern achievement-cohort practice screen.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major downgrade. The grammatical-voice relocation is already present in academic theology and philosophy.
near_neighbors.overlap: Extremely close for the proposed new variable. Lewin explicitly treats mystical relinquishment of will through the middle voice, between activity and passivity.
near_neighbors.source: David Lewin, The middle voice in Eckhart and modern continental philosophy, https://strathprints.strath.ac.uk/56562/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate turns Shinran into a comparative diagnostic against universal release teachings.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades the slogan 'you cannot release what you never held' to a Shinran-compatible restatement.
near_neighbors.overlap: Direct primary near-neighbor. Shinran already denies practicer calculation and says no working is true working in Other Power.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate uses that structure to set a cohort boundary for modern achievement-driven practitioners.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade for the Other Power anomaly and self-power critique.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. Tannisho says nembutsu is not practice or good act for the practicer because it arises wholly from Other Power and is free of self-power.
near_neighbors.source: Tannisho, A Record in Lament of Divergences, https://shinranworks.com/related-works-by-other-authors/a-record-in-lament-of-divergences/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate frames Dogen as evidence for active versus middle voice completion-talk, which may or may not be native to Soto categories.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades the no-after and no-owner insight. The possible addition is comparative sorting.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close anomaly and near-neighbor. Practice-realization already rejects separating means and end, practice and later attainment.
near_neighbors.source: Soto Zen, Practice and Realization Are One, https://www.sotozen.com/eng/library/stories/vol01.html

near_neighbors.difference: Pargament studies coping style, not method completion or release of practice results.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades agency novelty. The candidate must show voice coding predicts beyond Pargament-style agency coding.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for agency distribution. Self-directing, collaborative, and deferring styles already distinguish personal agency, exchange with God, and waiting for divine action.
near_neighbors.source: Pargament et al., Religion and the Problem-Solving Process: Three Styles of Coping, https://icmglt.org/icmlibrary/religion-and-the-problem-solving-process-three-styles-of-coping/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate uses this as a grid-breaking case rather than as Mahayana teaching in its own right.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades the no-attainment and retained-reliance analysis to known primary material.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for no attainment plus reliance. The text negates attainment while keeping Prajnaparamita operative.

near_neighbors.difference: They do not offer the same cohort-specific practice screen for achievement-contingent self-worth.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major downgrade for the retirement of the two-axis grid. The likely contribution is an applied synthesis.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for self-dismantling method, therapeutic no-thesis practice, and apophatic language that turns back on itself.
near_neighbors.source: Joshua William Smith, Snakes and Ladders, https://philpapers.org/rec/SMISAL-7, and Michael Sells, Mystical Languages of Unsaying, https://press.uchicago.edu/ucp/books/book/chicago/M/bo3635525.html

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate explicitly falsifies the universal release frame and proposes voice as a better variable.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Internal originality is moderate at best. Run a separability test before publication.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close internal neighborhood. These records already contain retain, release, embody, custody, threshold, and return grammars.
near_neighbors.source: Internal Lumenary priors, Holding Without Owning, The Test Is How You Return, Method's Reckoning, and Boundary and Custody at the Threshold

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a discovery. Publish, if at all, as a bounded practice-fit rule for achievement-contingent self-worth.
Search and read full Lewin, Pargament, Dogen scholarship, Jodo Shinshu scholarship, grace-effort theology, Gelassenheit, and middle-voice theology before raising novelty.
Build a separability test against Holding Without Owning, The Test Is How You Return, and Method's Reckoning. Merge if blind readers cannot distinguish the claims.

Create a voice-coding sheet with values for active, middle, passive, mixed-by-stage, simultaneous-mixed, no-owner, no-threshold, practice-realization, radical Other Power, analyst-frame-refused, and undecidable.

Run the Earning Check pilot only after screening for perfectionism, scrupulosity, avoidance, workload coercion, and clinical risk. Track whether it reduces self-worth conversion without weakening responsibility.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.55 to 0.39. The strongest prior-art pressure is Lewin's middle-voice analysis plus Shinran's explicit Other Power and Pargament's agency styles. Human-condition fit is strong but narrow: high-striving people with achievement-contingent self-worth, burnout, comparison, and result-ownership. Non-fit cases include acute crisis, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, scrupulosity, dissociation, psychosis, people in grace-centered or nondual practice who do not experience ownership, and people whose distress is caused mainly by structural exploitation rather than self-rating.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say the claim is simply self-power versus Other Power, grace versus works, practice-realization, or middle-voice theology in new language, and that it does not change sequencing, warning, or repair.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the voice screen to prevent specific mismatches, identify when release advice reinstalls a controller, and predict which students need result-release rather than surrender, teacher guidance, rest, or ordinary responsibility.
questions: Is active, middle, and passive completion-talk a real practitioner distinction, or an imposed analyst metaphor?
Would 'release the method' confuse or harm a practitioner whose tradition says the work was never self-owned?
Can you name concrete cases where release advice helped high-striving practitioners but harmed or confused other-power or nondual practitioners?
Does voice coding change guidance beyond older labels such as self-power, Other Power, grace, surrender, non-attainment, or Pargament coping style?
relevant_practitioners: Soto Zen teachers familiar with Dogen practice-realization
Rinzai Zen teachers familiar with koan curriculum and post-kensho guidance
Christian spiritual directors familiar with grace and discernment
Scholars of Eckhart, Heidegger, and middle voice
Clinicians and coaches working with perfectionism, burnout, and achievement-contingent self-worth

primary_pair: Shinran, On Jinen-Honi and Tannisho, https://shinranworks.com/letters/lamp-for-the-latter-ages/on-jinen-honi-1258/ and https://shinranworks.com/related-works-by-other-authors/a-record-in-lament-of-divergences/
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. 'Middle voice' is an analyst metaphor that may not map cleanly onto Japanese, Sanskrit, Pali, or Chinese practice grammar. The active versus middle distinction may become a renamed self-power versus Other Power distinction, or it may hide stage shifts where effort and surrender coexist.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: This audit did not read Japanese, Pali, Sanskrit, Chinese, or commentarial originals. It did not read full Lewin on middle voice, full Heidegger and Eckhart scholarship, full Pargament, full Hori, full Dogen scholarship, or Jodo Shinshu scholarship beyond accessible translations and summaries. No Shin, Soto, Rinzai, or Christian grace practitioners were interviewed.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 assumes a practitioner can grasp the Dhamma rightly, use it for crossing, and then not hold it as a possession. Shinran's jinen-honi and Tannisho relocate efficacy to Other Power and repeatedly reject practicer calculation, making even discussion of no working liable to become another working. This is a strong primary-text basis for narrowing release advice by agency grammar. But it also shows the candidate's central insight is not new inside Shinran: one cannot release as self-power what was never self-power to begin with.

title: You cannot release what you never held
unlike_statement: Unlike Lewin on middle voice, Shinran on Other Power, Dogen on practice-realization, Pargament on religious coping styles, Heart Sutra no-attainment reliance, Smith, Sells, and prior Lumenary completion models, this idea's possible contribution is a testable fit rule: give release-the-method advice only to practitioners whose own language shows active earning and result-ownership, then test whether the advice helps them more than it helps other-power, nondual, or practice-realization practitioners.
